scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (personal_info, daily_sleep, daily_activity, daily_readiness). Oura's other user-collection endpoints (daily_spo2, heartrate, sessions, tags, workouts, etc.) are out of scope; legacy itself never implemented them. capabilities.write is false (read-only, no obviously-safe reverse-ETL writes).
